subject: Cannot log in after too many password attempts
body: I was locked out after entering the wrong password a few times. Please help me get back into my account today.
resolution_summary: Thanks for confirming the issue is resolved. I'm marking this ticket as resolved now. If the problem returns, reply here and we can reopen it.
customer_message_history: I followed the reset link and I can sign in again now. Thanks.
response_history: Priority noted. Please use the password reset link tied to your registered email, complete the reset within 15 minutes, and then try signing in again. If the login still fails after the reset, reply here and we will continue with the next account security checks.

subject: Why was I charged twice on my invoice?
body: I paid invoice INV-2231 yesterday and now I see a second charge on my card. I need a clear explanation and next steps.
pending_customer_replies: I checked the card activity. Only one charge settled and the second one is still a pending authorization.
